name: l2_actuator_disk_representation_policy
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskRepresentationPolicy decides how rotor disks are represented before powered source-term APIs exist.
note: Reference surface for actuator-disk representation decisions.

name: l2_rotor_disk_aperture
value: Aerodynamics4McL2RotorDiskAperture supplies the open rotor-disk area and blockage estimate that this policy preserves.
note: Geometry input for actuator-disk representation decisions.

name: l2_powered_hover_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverAcceptanceGate keeps hover source-term coupling closed until live validation passes.
note: Required downstream gate before powered hover source terms can affect gameplay.

name: l2_powered_cruise_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseAcceptanceGate keeps cruise source-term coupling closed until live validation passes.
note: Required downstream gate before powered cruise source terms can affect gameplay.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future porous or body-force actuator-disk source APIs.
note: Upstream CFD target for future powered rotor representation.

name: actuator_disk_representation_policy
value: Do not represent powered actuator disks as filled binary solid-mask cells. Keep rotor disks open and wait for a porous or body-force source API plus hover and cruise acceptance gates before runtime coupling.
note: Method prevents prop-disk blockage from being mistaken for powered rotor source-term validation.
